description: Knowledge Access Hub combines Wikipedia and Open Library in one MCP for AI agents and learners. Search encyclopedia articles in 300+ languages, pull structured article summaries, discover textbooks via Open Library, or call build_reading_list to get a curated mix of articles and books for any topic — all without API keys. Unlike generic search bots, this server returns clean snippets, canonical URLs, and book metadata (author, year, OLID) ready for citations and reading lists. Ideal for tutoring agents, homework helpers, curriculum builders, and research copilots.
